\forall t = 1, \ldots, T:

\hat{h}_{z_t}^{(m)} &= \text{LayerNorm}\left(h_{z_t}^{(m-1)} + \text{RelAttn}\left(h_{z_t}^{(m-1)}, \left[\tilde{\mathbf{h}}^{(m-1)}, \mathbf{h}_{\mathbf{z} \leq t}^{(m-1)}\right]\right)\right) \\
h_{z_t}^{(m)} &= \text{LayerNorm}\left(\hat{h}_{z_t}^{(m)} + \text{PosFF}\left(\hat{h}_{z_t}^{(m)}\right)\right) \\
\hat{g}_{z_t}^{(m)} &= \text{LayerNorm}\left(g_{z_t}^{(m-1)} + \text{RelAttn}\left(g_{z_t}^{(m-1)}, \left[\tilde{\mathbf{h}}^{(m-1)}, \mathbf{h}_{\mathbf{z} < t}^{(m-1)}\right]\right)\right) \\
g_{z_t}^{(m)} &= \text{LayerNorm}\left(\hat{g}_{z_t}^{(m)} + \text{PosFF}\left(\hat{g}_{z_t}^{(m)}\right)\right)
\end{aligned}
```
